assignments.name: Assigned_Values_to_New_Survey_Record
assignments.label: Assigned Values to New Survey Record

value.stringValue: Please upload any files or pictures that you'd like to support your evaluation of academic supports
Please upload any files or pictures that you'd like to support your evaluation of disability supports
Please upload any files or pictures that you'd like to support your evaluation of social/emotional supports
Eligibility,Academic Supports,Disability Supports,Social/Emotional Supports,Financial Supports,Further Comment

decisions.name: Was_a_Draft_Survey_Passed_In
decisions.label: Was a Draft Survey Passed In?

Flow.description: Updated through eligibility info. Ability to save and return to page left off added.

fields.name: StudentTips
fields.fieldText: TIP: To correctly complete the SEED CSS, you must visit and explore support offices on campus. Please set aside the appropriate time to complete (approx. 1hr)

fields.name: Please_select_your_academic_classification
fields.fieldText: Please select your academic classification

fields.name: Please_select_your_age_range
fields.fieldText: Please select your age range

fields.name: Please_select_any_and_all_demographic_groups_that_you_personally_identify_with
fields.fieldText: Please select any and all demographic groups that you personally identify with

fields.name: ISE_Privacy_Statement
fields.fieldText: BY SELECTING THE "I AGREE" CHECKBOX BELOW, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT THE ISE TOOL, DESIGN AND CONTENT ARE PROPERTY OF THE SEED FOUNDATION, AND YOU AGREE NOT TO REPLICATE, REUSE, RETASK, COPY OR IN ANYWAY UTILISE THIS PROPERTY OUTSIDE OF YOUR USE OF THIS TOOL TO COMPLETE THE SURVEY WITHOUT THE SEED FOUNDATION'S EXPLICIT PRIOR CONSENT

fields.name: I_Agree
fields.fieldText: I Agree

fields.name: TIPs_for_Professionals
fields.fieldText: TIP: The SEED College Supports Survey does require a campus visit. To answer the questions effectively, you must visit and explore support offices on campus. Please set aside the appropriate time to complete (approx. 3hrs)

fields.name: Please_select_any_and_all_student_demographic_groups_that_you_serve
fields.fieldText: Please select any and all student demographic groups that you serve:

fields.name: AcademicSupports_Tutoring
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - Tutoring

fields.name: Is_there_a_campus_based_tutoring_program_for_the_general_student_body_that_offer
fields.fieldText: Is there a campus-based tutoring program for the general student body that offers tutoring support for basic and advanced courses?

fields.name: Campus_Tutoring_Accessible
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours and/or cost?

fields.name: Campus_Tutoring_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Campus_Tutoring_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Header_Appeals
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - Academic Appeals

fields.name: there_information_counseling_on_submitting_an_academic_appeal
fields.fieldText: Is there information/counseling on submitting an academic appeal?

fields.name: Academic_Appeal_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Academic_Appeals_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: AcademicSupports_Coaching_Header
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - Coaching Program

fields.name: Is_there_a_campus_run_academic_coaching_program_that_supports_the_development_of
fields.fieldText: Is there a campus-run academic coaching program that supports the development of academic skills (i.e. time management, note taking, overcoming test anxiety, etc...)?

fields.name: Academic_Coaching_Accessible
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: Coaching_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Coaching_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Research_Opportunities
fields.fieldText: Academic Support - Research Opportunities

fields.name: Does_the_campus_provide_opportunities_for_undergraduate_students_to_participate
fields.fieldText: Does the campus provide opportunities for undergraduate students to participate in research projects with faculty?

fields.name: Research_Easy_To_Find
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: Research_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Research_Opps_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: AcademicSupportsRoundUp
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - Round Up

fields.name: Academic_Elaboration
fields.fieldText: Please elaborate on the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of academic supports on your campus

fields.name: Academic_Support_Improvements
fields.fieldText: In what ways could your campus improve the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of academic supports?

fields.name: Header_SAP
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - SAP

fields.name: Is_there_information_counseling_on_satisfactory_academic_progress_SAP
fields.fieldText: Is there information/counseling on satisfactory academic progress (SAP)?

fields.name: Is_this_information_easy_to_find_SAP
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Is_it_easy_to_understand_SAP
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Header_SummerBridgeProgram
fields.fieldText: Academic Supports - Summer Bridge Program

fields.name: Summer_Bridge_Available
fields.fieldText: Is there a summer bridge program available for first-year students?

fields.name: Bridge_Easily_Advantaged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: Bridge_Program_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Bridge_Program_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: SurveyAlreadyComplete
fields.fieldText:
This survey was already submitted.


Please begin a new survey by returning to the Campus Support Surveys tab.

fields.name: WelcomeText
fields.fieldText:
Welcome to the The SEED Foundation's (SEED) College Supports Survey (CSS). Grounded in criteria recognized in national standards and best practices in college access & success, higher education and more than 20 years of SEED's college transition and completion experience, the SEED College Supports Survey evaluates the quality of campus-based supports in four key areas:


  • Academic Supports
  • Disability Supports
  • Social/Emotional Supports
  • Financial Supports

It is our hope that your participation in this evaluation advances dialogues and collaborative efforts between K-12, higher education, and community-based college support partners around the quality of campus ­based supports and their impact on college success.

fields.name: VerifySchool
fields.fieldText:
Please confirm that this is the school you wish to submit a Campus Support Survey for.


{!Get_School_Record.Name}

{!Get_School_Record.BillingStreet}

{!Get_School_Record.BillingCity}, {!Get_School_Record.BillingState} {!Get_School_Record.BillingPostalCode}

fields.name: Is_this_the_correct_school
fields.fieldText: Is this the correct school?

fields.name: DisabilitySupportsCollaboration
fields.fieldText: Disability Supports - Collaboration

fields.name: Disability_Supports_collab
fields.fieldText: Are there collaborative practices between the disability supports office, academic support offices, and health, counseling, and wellness offices in providing accommodations to students with disabilities?

fields.name: DisabilitySupportCollabOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: DisabilitySupportsDisabilityOffice
fields.fieldText: Disability Supports - Disability Office

fields.name: Disabilities_Support_Office
fields.fieldText: Disabilities Support Office

fields.name: Is_there_a_disabilities_support_office
fields.fieldText: Is there a disabilities support office or similar on the campus?

fields.name: Disabilities_Support_Office_Accessible
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: Disabilities_Support_Office_optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Disabilities_Support_Office_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: DisabilitiesSupportLowTech
fields.fieldText: Disability Supports - Low Tech

fields.name: LowHighTechAdaptive
fields.fieldText: Is there a range of low (ex. note taking) to high (ex. SMART pens) assistive/adaptive technology options available to support students with disabilities on your campus?

fields.name: AdaptiveTechEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: AdaptiveTechOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: AdaptiveTechEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Disability_Supports_Receiving_Services_Info
fields.fieldText: Disability Supports - Receiving Services

fields.name: CD3Disability_services_info
fields.fieldText: Is there information on how to receive services from the disability supports office?

fields.name: DC3_1Disability_Services_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: DC3_2Disability_Support_Info_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: DisabilitiesRoundUpElaborate
fields.fieldText: Please elaborate on the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of disability supports on your campus

fields.name: DisabilityServicesImprove
fields.fieldText: In what ways could your campus improve the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of disability supports?

fields.name: Disability_Services
fields.fieldText: Disability Supports - Services Available

fields.name: Disability_Services_Available
fields.fieldText: Is there information on the types of services available at the disability supports office?

fields.name: Disability_Support_Services_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Disability_Supports_Services_Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Please_select_your_occupational_status
fields.fieldText: Please select your occupational status

screens.name: FinAidGap
screens.label: Financial Supports - Emergency and Gap Scholarships

fields.name: FinAidGapHeader
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Emergency and Gap Scholarships

fields.name: FinAidGapAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the campus have institutional aid set aside for emergency and gap scholarships?

fields.name: FinAidGapOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAidGapEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FinAidRoundupComponent
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Round Up

fields.name: FinAidRoundupq1_0
fields.fieldText: Please elaborate on the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of financial aid supports on your campus:

fields.name: FinAidImprovements
fields.fieldText: In what ways could your campus improve the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of financial aid supports?

fields.name: FinancialSupports11supportHeader
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - 1-on-1 support

fields.name: FinAid11Available
fields.fieldText: Does the campus financial aid office offer 1-on-1 sessions with financial aid officers for questions and financial aid counseling?

fields.name: FinAid11Easy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: FinAid11Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAid11Encouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FinSupportAppealsHeader
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Aid appeals

fields.name: FinAidAppealAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the financial aid office offer information/counseling on submitting a financial aid appeal on your campus?

fields.name: FinAidAppealEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: FinAidAppealOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAidAppealEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FinancialAidSupportLettersHeader
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Award Letters

fields.name: FinAidLettersMay1
fields.fieldText: Does the campus financial aid office provide financial aid award letters by May 1st?

fields.name: FinAidLettersOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: Template_0_0
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Collaboration (outside scholarships/grants) 1

fields.name: FinAidOfficeOutsideGrantsAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the campus financial aid office and student accounts office (or similar) work together to apply outside scholarships and grants to students' accounts?

fields.name: FinAidOutsideGrantsOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAidOutsideGrantsEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FinSupportStudyAbroadHeader
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Study Abroad

fields.name: FinAidAbroadAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the campus financial aid office have institutional aid available for study abroad opportunities?

fields.name: FinAidAbroadEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: FinAidAbroadOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAidAbroadEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FinAidCollabDisplay
fields.fieldText: Financial Supports - Collaboration (outside scholarships/grants) 2

fields.name: FinAidCollabQ1Reduced
fields.fieldText: Does the campus financial aid office reduce institutional grants and scholarships if you receive outside scholarships and grants?

fields.name: FinAidCollab2OptimizedReduced
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: FinAidCollab2EncouragedReduced
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: FutherComment
fields.fieldText: Further Comments

fields.name: FutherCommentInstructions
fields.fieldText:
Please take advantage of this space to share or elaborate on any innovative programming, services, or funding processes on your campus that are structured to support the success of any of the traditionally underserved student groups mentioned below:


  • Adult Learner
  • First-Generation College Student
  • Low-Income (i.e. Pell Eligible)
  • Ethnic Minority (i.e. Hispanic, Asian American, African American, etc)
  • Student with Disability
  • Homeless
  • Undocumented
  • Student with a Dependent(s)
  • International Student
  • Military Student
  • Student (currently or previously) in the Foster Care System

fields.name: Futhercommentspace
fields.fieldText: Further Comments

fields.name: Instructions_Text
fields.fieldText:
INSTRUCTIONS


  1. For the current phase of SEED's College Supports data collection process, you must be currently employed by, enrolled in, or visiting the college/university for which you are completing survey. Please make sure that your responses are as honest, thorough, and descriptive as possible. This may require that you visit campus-support offices that you are unfamiliar with and talking with office staff.
  2. You must complete the survey in its entirety before you submit it. Incomplete submissions will not be accepted.
  3. The SEED College Supports Survey does not have to be completed in one sitting. You have the option to save your responses and submit at a later time.
  4. If you have any questions regarding the survey, please email collegesupportssurvey@seedfoundation.com.

fields.name: Template_0
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Multicultural Provision 3

fields.name: MulticulturalStff
fields.fieldText: Does the multicultural center (or similar) have a staff member that can respond to multicultural sensitivities and social justice concerns of students?

fields.name: MulticulturalStaffOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: PsychologicalTestingAvailable
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Psychological Testing

fields.name: PsychologicalTestingForStudentsAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the campus offer psychological testing for students?

fields.name: PsychologicalTestingEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: PsychologicalTestingOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: PsychologicalTestingEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: SocialEmotionalCounseling
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Counseling Services

fields.name: Counseling_Services_Available
fields.fieldText: Is there a counseling services office or similar on campus?

fields.name: CounselingServicesEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: CounselingServicesOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: CounselingServicesEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: MutliculturalProvisionOne
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Multicultural Provision 1

fields.name: MulticulturalCenterAvaliable
fields.fieldText: Does the campus have a multicultural center or similar?

fields.name: MulticulturalCenterEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: MulticulturalCenterOptimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: MulticulturalCenterEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: Multicultual2
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Multicultural Provision 2

fields.name: MulticulturalConnect
fields.fieldText: Does the multicultural affairs, diversity affairs or similar offices connect students to other university support programs?

fields.name: Social_Emotional_Psychiatry_Label
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Supports - Psychiatry

fields.name: PsychatricSupportAvailable
fields.fieldText: Does the counseling services office provide psychiatric consultation, evaluation, and support for students needing maintenance or monitoring of psychotropic medications?

fields.name: PsychatricSupportEasy
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to get to, find, and/or take advantage of based on location, hours, and/or cost?

fields.name: Psychatric_Services_Optimized
fields.fieldText: Is this information shared in a deliberate way to optimize the odds of students receiving it?

fields.name: PsychatricSupportEncouraged
fields.fieldText: Is it easy for students to use/understand or organized in a way that encourages use?

fields.name: SocialEmotionalRoundUp
fields.fieldText: Social/Emotional Campus Support - Round Up

fields.name: SocialEmotionalRoundupq1
fields.fieldText: Please elaborate on the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of social/emotional supports on your campus:

fields.name: SocialEmotionalImprovement
fields.fieldText: In what ways could your campus improve the availability, accessibility, communication, and structure of social/emotional supports?

fields.name: ThankYou
fields.fieldText:
Thank you for completing a Campus Support Survey!


Your survey is complete.
